title: blechnum pacificum
intro: Blechnum plicatum, also known as the water fern or Pacific chain fern, is a species of fern native to New Zealand. The medicinal properties of Blechnum plicatum are attributed to its high content of antioxidants, which have been shown to have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. This plant is believed to provide several health benefits, including reducing inflammation and improving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma. In traditional medicine, Blechnum plicatum is often prepared as a tea or infusion, and may also be used in herbal tinctures and poultices for topical application.
